- **Result**: All tests pass (2 passing, 6 todo)
- **Approach**: This is the most minimal possible implementation. A single cell at [0,0] has zero live neighbors, so it dies from underpopulation, resulting in an empty array - which is exactly what the hardcoded `return []` produces.
